title: SWE-PRM Coding Process Reward
description: Process reward annotation for software engineering agent traces. Annotators verify each coding action step taken by an SWE agent when resolving GitHub issues, identifying the first step where the agent goes astray and classifying the error type.
citation: @article{gandhi2025agents, title={When Agents go Astray: Course-Correcting SWE Agents with PRMs}, author={Gandhi, Shubham and Tsay, Jason and Ganhotra, Jatin and Kate, Kiran and Rizk, Yara}, journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2509.02360}, year={2025}}
